scope: all public HTML; main content links separated from sidebar; hub blocks identified by nearest heading
heuristic_notes: Куди здати X -> concrete /utylizaciya-X.html, /zbir-X.html, or /pererobka-X.html is treated as valid when the target exists; this confirms the corrected route rule.
Переробка/Збір/Логістика/Сортування anchors pointing to matching concrete cluster pages are not counted wrong-topic.
Wrong-topic is counted for missing targets, concrete anchors pointing to generic hub placeholders, and explicit intent/cluster conflicts.
